title: rubus × columnaris
intro: Rubus × columnaris, also known as the Columnar Bramble, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Rubus genus and is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. The plant is rich in anthocyanins, a type of flavonoid with medicinal properties that exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Rubus × columnaris include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and have neuroprotective effects. Rubus × columnaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine and as dietary supplements.
